headline: Billionaire Mark Cuban Says Buying 2 Years Of Toothpaste At 50% Off Beats Regular Investments — 'It's So Hard To Make A Return'
summary: Toothpaste usually does not get mentioned in the same sentence as investment strategy unless somebody is trying to survive a warehouse-store checkout line. But billionaire Mark Cuban once argued that grabbing everyday essentials at steep discounts can deliver better returns...

headline: Malaysia to unveil oil supply continuity plan as Iran conflict strains reserves
summary: Investing.com -- Malaysian Prime Minister Anwar Ibrahim will soon outline a strategic plan to secure the nation’s oil supply amid ongoing uncertainties from the conflict in Iran.

headline: Colgate-Palmolive: Too Expensive For A Defensive Firm
summary: Colgate-Palmolive's Q1 EPS fell 6% amid weak organic growth and FX risks due to US headwinds. Learn why CL stock is a hold.

headline: With Spirit gone, what could this mean for passenger throughput numbers?
summary: Investing.com -- Transportation Security Administration (TSA) screening data for U.S. airlines showed a marginal improvement last week, although year-over-year growth remains in negative territory.
